title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited:
Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited!
